← AEAOS
7-Layer Stack
v2.0.0

7-Layer Stack

DMS §0 · Spec → Architecture → Runtime → SDK → Platform → Applications → Operations
One frozen domain model, one platform kernel, one runtime — consumed bottom-up by SDK, Platform, Applications and Operations. No parallel entity definitions, no architectural drift.

// The Stack

Each layer is built on the one below it. The bottom three (Spec, Architecture, Runtime) are fixed V2 foundations; the top four (SDK, Platform, Applications, Operations) are the product surface that consumes them.

AEAOS v2.0.0 — Enterprise AI Agent Operating System
Understand. Decide. Execute. Evolve.
